qa_pairs.canonical_question: Which cinema entities with capacity equal to '908' and location equal to 'County Clare' and name equal to 'Mount Callan', having at least one related schedule record (linked on cinema.cinema_id = schedule.cinema_id) with date equal to '20 May' and price equal to '9.99', whose schedule record itself has at least one related film record (linked on schedule.film_id = film.film_id) with title equal to 'The Case of the Bermuda Triangle'?

qa_pairs.question: What cinemas are showing The Case of the Mystery Weekend directed by Bill Schreiner, where the film’s number in season is at most 1, the date is 11 July, and the ticket price is no more than 9.99?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT cinema.cinema_id FROM cinema
JOIN schedule ON cinema.cinema_id = schedule.cinema_id
JOIN film ON schedule.film_id = film.film_id
WHERE schedule.price <= 9.99 AND schedule.date = '11 July' AND film.directed_by = 'Bill Schreiner' AND film.number_in_season <= 1 AND film.title = 'The Case of the Mystery Weekend'

qa_pairs.question: Which cinemas with a capacity of exactly 908 have schedules on 20 May showing films numbered at most 4 in the season, with exactly 5 show times per day and ticket prices at most 9.99?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT cinema.cinema_id FROM cinema
JOIN schedule ON cinema.cinema_id = schedule.cinema_id
JOIN film ON schedule.film_id = film.film_id
WHERE schedule.price <= 9.99 AND cinema.capacity = 908 AND film.number_in_season <= 4 AND schedule.date = '20 May' AND schedule.show_times_per_day = 5

qa_pairs.question: Which cinemas named Gortahile located in County Laois have schedules priced at least 12.99?
qa_pairs.sql:
SELECT cinema.cinema_id FROM cinema
JOIN schedule ON cinema.cinema_id = schedule.cinema_id
JOIN film ON schedule.film_id = film.film_id
WHERE cinema.name = 'Gortahile' AND schedule.price >= 12.99 AND cinema.location = 'County Laois'

JOIN film ON schedule.film_id = film.film_id

JOIN film ON schedule.film_id = film.film_id
WHERE cinema.openning_year = 2012 AND cinema.location = 'County Cork' AND film.rank_in_series = 26 AND schedule.date = '11 July'
